applicability_notes: Ternary elementwise select. Condition tensor is treated as boolean (nonzero == True); tests pass (x > 0) or .bool() as condition. Supports scalar true/false values (see call site: ttnn.where(pad_mask, ADDITIVE_MASKED_VALUE, ADDITIVE_UNMASKED_VALUE) implementing an additive attention mask, equivalent to torch.where(mask, masked_val, unmasked_val)). Common fusion neighbor: ttnn.gt producing the condition (masked_fill idiom: torch.where(mask > 0, masked_value, scores)). Supports optional output_tensor= for in-place-style writes.

placement_observations.source: model call site: masked_positions = ttnn.gt(expanded_mask, 0); if masked_positions.memory_config() != target_memcfg: masked_positions = ttnn.to_memory_config(masked_positions, target_memcfg) — condition tensor is explicitly converted to match the attention_scores memory config (target_memcfg) before ttnn.where, i.e. all where() operands must share the same memory config at this call site; concrete buffer/shard spec is runtime-determined.
